value.stringValue:
Hi,

A Client Agreement Request has been created for the following Opportunity: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name}

The following case has been created: {!$Record.CaseNumber}

Thank you,

{!$Record.Opportunity__r.Owner.FirstName}

constants.description: This is a constant that stores the Description for the task that gets created post denial of the risk review

value.stringValue: Assess if clinical match is needed or should be adjusted

constants.description: This is a constant that stores the Subject for the task that gets created post denial of the risk review
